title: ROTATION Pry Bar Set Heavy Duty, Thicker Hammer Strike Cap, Angled Tip, Mechanic Hand Tools for Automotive, Demolition, Nail Puller, Crowbar | 4-Piece | Red
features: Comfortable Handle: the rubber handle brings you a comfortable and non-slip grip.
Solid Strike Cap: there's a built-in cap on the top of the sturdy handle for hammer striking.
Heavy Duty Design: the blade is made of industrial-grade forged iron steel with strength and durability.
Maximum Power: the angled tip creates a high-leverage fulcrum for lifting and prying.
description: Pry bar is an essential tool for everyday job. You can not only use it for house refurbishing but also for vehicle repairing. It can help you to pry, lift, position and align machinery and parts in a much easier way. This pry bar set can handle intensive uses. The 4-piece pry bar set is constructed with heat treated alloy steel and feature a thicker square bar steel that won’t easily flex or twist, providing increased strength. It features full tang go-through heavy duty striking caps at the ends of its handles, preventing damage to the handles when striking. The pry bars' angled tip provide high-leverage fulcrums for lifting and prying even in tight spaces.
